## Summary

Explain what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore or tooling
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security

## Scope Control

- [ ] This change stays within the approved CareerBoost AI Version 1.0 scope.
- [ ] This change avoids unrelated refactoring.
- [ ] This change updates documentation when needed.

## Validation

Describe the checks performed.

- [ ] Formatting
- [ ] Linting
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Build
- [ ] Manual verification
- [ ] Not applicable because:

## Screenshots or Evidence

Add screenshots, logs, terminal output, or links when useful. Remove secrets,
resume content, and personal information.

## Risk Assessment

Describe risks, edge cases, migration impact, security concerns, or rollback notes.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out specific areas where review attention is needed.
